sentences.arabic: أَخَذَتْ لَانَا فَتْرَةَ اسْتِرَاحَةٍ فِي الْعَاشِرَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Lana je uzela pauzu u deset ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Lana took a break at ten in the morning.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى الْمَطْبَخِ وَأَعَدَّتْ فِنْجَانَ قَهْوَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Otišla je u kuhinju i pripremila šolju kafe.
sentences.translationEn: She went to the kitchen and prepared a cup of coffee.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ مَعَ زَمِيلَيْنِ وَتَحَدَّثُوا بِضْعَ دَقَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Sjela je s dvije kolege i razgovarali su nekoliko minuta.
sentences.translationEn: She sat with two colleagues and they talked for a few minutes.

sentences.arabic: عَادَتْ إِلَى عَمَلِهَا بَعْدَ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ وَهِيَ أَكْثَرُ نَشَاطًا.
sentences.translation: Vratila se na posao nakon pauze svježija.
sentences.translationEn: She returned to her work after the break feeling more energetic.
